name: Priya Sharma
about: 6 years in luxury leather goods and outerwear at Burberry and Ferragamo. Extensive clienteling experience but hasn't worked Reflex shifts yet. Seeking full-time placement.
interviewTranscript: I have extensive experience in luxury leather goods—six years between Burberry and Ferragamo. Clienteling has been my specialty. I maintain a book of clients who come back to me season after season. What brings me to Reflex is that I'm relocating and looking to establish myself with new retailers while I search for my next permanent home. I know the luxury customer inside and out.
